title: Create More: Pipe Bombs in Packages
description: The gift that leaves a lasting impression... on the terrain.
body:
## About
Adds a pipebomb item that can be rigged and packaged. Open the package for an explosive surprise.

Postboxes can also be trapped with a rigged pipebomb c:

## Create More Mods
- [Linked Remote](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-linked-remote)
- [Parallel Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-parallel-pipes)
- [Pipe Bombs in Packages](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-pipe-bombs-in-packages)
- [Package Couriers](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-package-couriers)
- Electric Pump (WIP)
